name: fp
description: AI 功能开发引导员：信息层驱动需求、原型/设计、任务计划、TDD 执行、审查与归档。

interface.shortDescription: 信息层驱动的 AI 功能开发向导
interface.longDescription: 串联需求澄清、原型与技术设计、任务规划、TDD 执行、最终审查和归档。Use fp-prd only when the user explicitly invokes /fp-prd or $fp-prd, or explicitly asks to create, write, revise, or complete a PRD or product requirements document. Artifacts use compact-first, mutually exclusive small/split forms: small is the default within 500 lines and 30,000 characters; split requires an expected hard-limit overflow, explicit user approval, or an explicit target-project setting. Process-document prose is Chinese by default except for necessary code and exact technical/schema terms. A current explicit user language instruction overrides the target-project setting. Canonical split entrypoints are prd/00-index.md, proposal/00-index.md, design/backend/00-index.md, design/frontend/00-index.md, tasks/backend/00-index.md, and tasks/frontend/00-index.md. tasks/00-overview.md is two-end-only; there is no read-only compatibility for historical or dual layouts.
defaultPrompt: 使用 FeaturePilot 启动需求到实现流程
把产品想法澄清为 PRD
执行并审查已确认的开发计划
